product_type: Two Post Inground Lift - Underground Hydraulic Lines Layout

installation_requirements.welding_specs: AWS specifications to E-70XX electrodes or E-70T1 code 5.3 flux core wire only
recommended_layout_instructions: 1. Layout location of base plates with chalk line
5. Place hydraulic lines and adjust before anchoring columns

features: In-ground hydraulic line routing through floor slot for TP-26A
4" wide x 2" deep floor slot for hydraulic lines
notes: Unless otherwise specified, surface finish to be 125 RMS
Welding medium shall conform to AWS specifications to E-70XX electrodes or E-70T1 code 5.3 flux core wire only

Recommended layout instructions: 1) Layout location of base plates with chalk line, 2) Layout slot with chalk lines, 3) Cut out slot, 4) Locate columns, 5) Place hydraulic lines and adjust before anchoring columns, 6) Anchor columns
